response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong full-stack and systems experience, but the resume shows minimal alignment with the core requirements of this role. There is no demonstrated Kotlin experience, no Spring ecosystem work, no IDE-internals or language-tooling background, and Java appears only briefly (robotic arms at Altom, listed in skills). The bulk of recent work is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which does not transfer well to JVM-focused IDE tooling for enterprise Java/Kotlin.
strengths: Senior-level experience across complex systems and large codebases
Brief exposure to C/C++ IDE component work at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Strong testing/TDD discipline and developer-tooling mindset
concerns: No Kotlin and no Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience shown
Very limited Java exposure; no deep JVM work in recent roles
No IDE-internals or language-tooling experience for the JVM ecosystem
